question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/config/ThrottleConfiguration.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: gasLimitBucket()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that gasLimitBucket uses Bandwidth.builder().capacity(gasLimit).refillGreedy(gasLimit, Duration.ofSeconds(1)) with identical capacity and refill rate to perform a window-boundary attack, consuming all tokens just before the window resets and again immediately after, doubling effective gas consumption and causing traffic outside design parameters?
